input.background: Use Table E to find the approximate area under the curve to the right of 5.22 on a chi-square distribution with 3 degrees of freedom.
input.question: Draw the chi-square curve showing 5.22 on the horizontal axis. Shade the area to the right of 5.22.

output.answer: The area under the curve is between the chi-square landmarks of 4.64 (right-tail 0.20) and 5.32 (right-tail 4.15).
